clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: The OAuth client ID for OpenAI Codex API. A default is provided from Codex CLI.

model.description: The OpenAI Codex model to use for generating responses

texts.aboutApiSettings: Configure your OpenAI Codex OAuth settings. Click "Connect with OpenAI" to authorize via OAuth, or expand Advanced Settings to enter tokens manually.
